sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value UInt32, bitmap_val AggregateFunction(bitmapUnion, UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmap_val, (value % 3), 5)) AS subset FROM test_table WHERE value % 2 = 0 ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmapBuild([value, (id % 4), 100]), 20, 3)) AS res FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE id < 4) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE 0 = 1; -- This should create an empty table for further testing;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, value, bitmap_val FROM test_table WHERE id % 3 = 0;
SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmap_val, 15 % 10, 2)) AS subset FROM temp_table GROUP BY id HAVING avg_value > 10;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmapBuild([value, NULL]), toUInt32(10), 3)) AS res FROM test_table WHERE bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmap_val, toUInt32(5), 5) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE fuzzy_test (num String, bitmap UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY num;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapSubsetLimit(bitmap_val, length(num) % 2, 2)) AS results FROM (SELECT bitmapBuild([CAST(num AS UInt32)]) AS bitmap_val FROM fuzzy_test) AS nested_query;
